summary: P0 Data Leak Fix Verified: User Chart Data Isolation - /api/dashboard/user-chart-data endpoint correctly filters bidding activity based on user role. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Dashboard correctly uses getUserChartData() for role-scoped data.

issues: Minor: Recharts warning about chart dimensions (-1, -1) - does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Data isolation fix correctly implemented in analytics.py get_user_chart_data()
Advertiser role filters by owner_id on campaigns collection
Admin role filters by own campaigns + advertisers under their parent_id
Super Admin sees all data with no filtering
Frontend Dashboard.jsx correctly uses getUserChartData() instead of getChartData()
Auth interceptor in api.js properly includes Bearer token

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Dashboard verified for Advertiser and Super Admin roles)

context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 data leak fix verified. The /api/dashboard/user-chart-data endpoint correctly isolates bidding activity data by role. Advertiser sees only their own campaign data (empty if no campaigns assigned to them). Admin sees team data. Super Admin sees all platform data. Existing campaigns have null owner_id so admin/advertiser dashboards show empty charts - this is expected behavior. To see non-empty data for advertiser/admin, campaigns need to be created with proper owner_id assignment.

tests: Super Admin sees all platform data
Admin sees team-scoped data (own + advertisers under them)
Advertiser sees only own campaign data
Response structure consistent across roles (labels, bids, wins, spend arrays)
Auth interceptor adds Bearer token automatically

role_dashboard_separation.Advertiser: Shows 'Your Campaign Performance' with own metrics only
role_dashboard_separation.Super Admin: Shows 'Platform Overview' with all platform metrics

admin_data.reason: No campaigns with admin's owner_id or their advertisers' owner_ids

data_isolation_verification.conclusion: Data isolation working correctly - users only see data for campaigns they own or manage
